parameters.query:
SELECT help911_create_lead(
  '{{ $json.body.firstName }}',
  '{{ $json.body.lastName || "" }}',
  '{{ $json.body.phone }}',
  '{{ $json.body.city || "Atlanta" }}',
  {{ $json.body.accidentDate ? "'" + $json.body.accidentDate + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.body.needsAttorney || false }},
  {{ $json.body.needsTreatment || false }},
  {{ $json.body.needsTransportation || false }},
  {{ $json.body.notSure || false }},
  '{{ $json.body.source || "app" }}'
) as result;

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "locationId": "My8EzLOwxDNkXVKLbFBh",
  "firstName": "{{ $('Webhook - Lead Intake').item.json.body.firstName }}",
  "lastName": "{{ $('Webhook - Lead Intake').item.json.body.lastName || '' }}",
  "phone": "{{ $('Webhook - Lead Intake').item.json.body.phone }}",
  "tags": ["help911", "app_lead", "new"],
  "source": "Help 911 App",
  "customFields": [
    {"id": "17vQEJWpVCf9gJYIG0A1", "field_value": "{{ $('Webhook - Lead Intake').item.json.body.accidentDate || '' }}"},
    {"id": "SEFg5RMLfSzNJlhxWSmh", "field_value": "{{ $('Webhook - Lead Intake').item.json.body.needsAttorney ? 'Yes' : 'No' }}"},
    {"id": "Vd75D4j5nWC6h4GYYlin", "field_value": "{{ $('Webhook - Lead Intake').item.json.body.needsTreatment ? 'Yes' : 'No' }}"},
    {"id": "m3DU0BBqwnfxBw4d9q3u", "field_value": "{{ $('Webhook - Lead Intake').item.json.body.needsTransportation ? 'Yes' : 'No' }}"},
    {"id": "Ru2Csh7AjUBNModKS4PH", "field_value": "app"},
    {"id": "W8frBt8kbZ5aqifgHNsq", "field_value": "New"}
  ]
}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO help911_ghl_sync (direction, entity_type, entity_id, ghl_id, payload, status)
VALUES ('to_ghl', 'contact', 
  '{{ $('Supabase - Create Lead').item.json[0].result.id }}',
  '{{ $json.contact.id }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json) }}'::jsonb,
  'success');
UPDATE help911_leads SET ghl_contact_id = '{{ $('GHL - Create Contact').item.json.contact.id }}' WHERE id = {{ $('Supabase - Create Lead').item.json[0].result.id }};

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, lead_id: $('Supabase - Create Lead').item.json[0].result.lead_id, ghl_contact_id: $('GHL - Create Contact').item.json.contact.id } }}
